title: HP All-in-One Printer
description: Print, scan, and copy in a single compact device with wireless and mobile printing support.

highlights.title: All-in-One Functionality
highlights.description: Print, scan, and copy in a single compact device.

highlights.title: Wireless & Mobile Printing
highlights.description: Supports Wi-Fi, USB, and mobile apps like HP Smart for easy printing from phones.

highlights.title: High-Quality Output
highlights.description: Sharp text and vibrant color printing for documents and photos.

highlights.title: Energy Efficient Design
highlights.description: Optimized power usage with auto on/off features.

highlights.title: Reliable Performance
highlights.description: Designed for consistent daily home and office use.

title: Canon PIXMA G3010
description: Refillable Ink Tank All-in-One Printer designed for high-volume printing with very low cost per page.

highlights.title: All-in-One Functionality
highlights.description: Print, scan, and copy in a single efficient device.

highlights.title: Refillable Ink Tank System
highlights.description: Designed for high-volume printing with very low cost per page.

highlights.title: Wireless & Mobile Printing
highlights.description: Supports Wi-Fi, USB, and mobile apps for easy printing from smartphones.

highlights.title: High-Resolution Output
highlights.description: Produces sharp text and vibrant images (up to 4800 × 1200 dpi).

highlights.title: Compact & User-Friendly Design
highlights.description: Built-in ink tanks and simple controls for easy operation.

specs.label: INK SYSTEM
specs.value: GI-series ink bottles (high page yield up to thousands of pages)

specs.label: IDEAL USE
specs.value: Home, students, and small offices with medium to heavy printing needs

title: MSI High-Performance Laptop
description: Equipped with latest processors and NVIDIA RTX graphics for heavy gaming and creative workloads.

highlights.title: High-Performance Gaming & Creative Power
highlights.description: Equipped with latest Intel Core / AMD Ryzen processors and NVIDIA RTX graphics for heavy workloads.

highlights.title: Advanced Cooling Technology
highlights.description: Efficient thermal systems ensure stable performance during gaming and multitasking.

highlights.title: High-End Graphics & Display
highlights.description: Designed for gamers and creators with powerful GPUs and immersive displays.

highlights.title: Custom Performance Software
highlights.description: Tools like MSI Center help optimize performance, cooling, and system settings.

highlights.title: Premium Build & Design
highlights.description: Available in gaming, business, and thin-light series with stylish designs.

specs.label: PROCESSOR
specs.value: Intel Core i7 / i9 or AMD Ryzen 7 / 9

specs.label: IDEAL USE
specs.value: Gaming, video editing, 3D design, high-performance tasks

title: Apple MacBook (M-Series)
description: Powered by Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) for fast and efficient performance with all-day battery life.

highlights.title: Apple Silicon Performance
highlights.description: Powered by M-series chips (M1, M2, M3) for fast and efficient performance.

highlights.title: Premium Build Quality
highlights.description: Sleek aluminum design with lightweight and durable construction.

highlights.title: Retina Display Technology
highlights.description: High-resolution displays with accurate colors and brightness.

highlights.title: Long Battery Life
highlights.description: Optimized hardware and software deliver all-day battery performance.

highlights.title: macOS Ecosystem Integration
highlights.description: Seamless experience with iPhone, iPad, and other Apple devices.

specs.label: IDEAL USE
specs.value: Students, professionals, coding, video editing, everyday productivity
